expected.notes: Rule advisory_address_update has no conditions (always fires for student track), but since this is slice B (negative near-miss), the case must NOT fire it by design, demonstrating the engine correctly evaluates empty condition sets.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'advisory_address_update', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:

No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
